case.title: TELEPHONE NEWS SYSTEM, INC. v. ILLINOIS BELL TELEPHONE

opinion.h1: TELEPHONE NEWS SYSTEM, INC. v. ILLINOIS BELL TELEPHONE, 376 U.S. 782 (1964)
opinion.h4: TELEPHONE NEWS SYSTEM, INC., v. ILLINOIS BELL TELEPHONE CO. ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF ILLINOIS. No. 772. Decided April 6, 1964.
opinion.p: Thomas D. Nash, Jr. for appellant.
Solicitor General Cox for the United States, and Walter J. Cummings, Jr. for Illinois Bell Telephone Co., appellees.
MR. JUSTICE DOUGLAS is of the opinion that probable jurisdiction should be noted.
